name: Finix
description: Finix — US payments infrastructure API enabling SaaS platforms to become payment facilitators with card processing and payouts.

seo.title: Finix — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Finix: Finix — US payments infrastructure API enabling SaaS platforms to become payment facilitators with card processing and payouts.

when_to_use: Becoming a payment facilitator: SaaS platform embedding card processing
Merchant onboarding and card payment processing via Finix PayFac API
White-label payment infrastructure for vertical SaaS products
Payout and settlement automation for two-sided platform marketplaces

review.verdict: Serious Stripe Connect alternative for SaaS platforms wanting payfac economics and control over the stack.
review.best_for: SaaS platforms ready to operate as payment facilitators for sub-merchants
review.not_for: Single merchants or teams wanting zero-ops turnkey checkout

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metering; scales with consumption, no explicit peak-lock.
